title: milium leibergii
intro: Milium leibergii, also known as Leiberg's millet grass, is a type of grass native to North America that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which may help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Milium leibergii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Milium leibergii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
